design_philosophy.core_concept: Surgical precision for the Istanbul Stock Exchange. Dark, focused, and data-dense.
design_philosophy.visual_style: High-contrast dark mode with electric green indicators. Grid-based layouts that prioritize data density over decorative whitespace.

theme_strategy.reasoning: Financial terminals are dark by default to reduce eye strain during long analysis sessions. The 'Green' accent pops best against deep obsidian.

headings.usage: Page titles, ticker symbols, key metrics

body.usage: General content, news snippets, chatbot responses

primary.name: BIST Bull Green
primary.usage: Primary actions, positive price changes, gainers

destructive.name: Loss Red
destructive.usage: Negative price changes, delete actions, errors

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-wide hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(34,197,94,0.3)]

inputs.style: bg-black/20 border-border focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary rounded-none

trading_view_widget.wrapper_class: w-full h-[600px] border border-border bg-card relative overflow-hidden

chatbot.container: fixed bottom-6 right-6 w-96 h-[500px] bg-card border border-border shadow-2xl z-50 flex flex-col
chatbot.message_user: bg-primary/10 text-primary-foreground self-end rounded-tl-lg rounded-bl-lg rounded-br-lg p-3 max-w-[80%]
chatbot.message_bot: bg-muted text-foreground self-start rounded-tr-lg rounded-bl-lg rounded-br-lg p-3 max-w-[80%]

textures.noise: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)' opacity='0.05'/%3E%3C/svg%3E")

effects.scanline: background: linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(255,255,255,0), rgba(255,255,255,0) 50%, rgba(0,0,0,0.1) 50%, rgba(0,0,0,0.1)); background-size: 100% 4px;

hero_backgrounds.description: Istanbul Minarets at Twilight - Use for Landing Page Hero overlay
Istanbul City Bridge Night - Alternative Hero

abstract_finance.description: Glowing Data Lines - Use for 'Market Overview' section background or AI Chatbot header
Digital Numbers Macro - Use for Educational Content headers

setup: Install dependencies: `yarn add lucide-react recharts framer-motion clsx tailwind-merge`
Update `tailwind.config.js` with the provided color palette (obsidian/green).
Ensure `index.css` applies the dark theme by default.
Install Shadcn components: `npx shadcn-ui@latest init` (yes to defaults, but overwrite colors later).
layout_rules: Use the 'Bento Grid' for the dashboard. The 'Popular Stocks' should be a large 2x2 card.
The 'Chatbot' should be a persistent floating action button (FAB) that expands into a dialog.
The 'Stock Detail' page must prioritize the TradingView widget (use `react-tradingview-widget` or iframe).
Ensure the app is fully responsive. Tables should scroll horizontally on mobile.
data_handling: Mock the `borsa-api` responses if the API is not connected yet, but design the UI to handle real-time flickers (green/red flashes on price change).
All numeric data must be formatted (e.g., '1.234,56 ₺'). Turkish locale.

specific_pages.home: Hero section with Istanbul night image + value prop. Below: Top Gainers/Losers cards.
specific_pages.dashboard: Dense data view. Sidebar nav. Main content: 'Market at a Glance'.
specific_pages.stock_detail: Header: Ticker + Price + Big % Change. Body: Full width TradingView Chart. Footer: Fundamentals grid.
specific_pages.education: Simple blog layout. Cards with 'Digital Numbers' images.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do NOT use gradients for text. It lowers readability.
Do NOT use centered text for long paragraphs. Left align always.
Use `data-testid` on all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links).
If a component needs to be created, check `src/components/ui` first.
Animations: Use `framer-motion` for page transitions and list entry animations (staggered).
